title: DataMatrix
objectives: Encode GS1 AI data with FNC1
Choose DataMatrix vs QR for a use case

sections.markdown: **DataMatrix** is a compact 2D matrix barcode (square or rectangular) using Reed-Solomon error correction. When used with GS1 (as **GS1 DataMatrix**), the first character is FNC1 — signalling that the payload is a stream of Application Identifiers.

sections.code:
GS1 DataMatrix payload (with FNC1 as start-of-message):
  <FNC1> 01 08901234000015 17 261231 10 BATCH42 21 SN-777

Parsing rules:
  - Fixed-length AIs (01, 17) read exact digit count
  - Variable-length AIs (10, 21, 91-99) end at FNC1 or end-of-data
  - FNC1 = 0x1D (GS in ASCII) — invisible to humans, delimits fields

sections.markdown: DataMatrix dominates **regulated industries**: pharmaceuticals (EU FMD / US DSCSA), medical devices (UDI), electronic components. Its compactness lets you fit GTIN + batch + expiry + serial on a tiny label — critical for small syringes or pills.

Ignoring the FNC1 → treating the payload as plain text. Without recognizing FNC1 (0x1D), your parser can't tell where a variable-length AI ends. Every GS1 DataMatrix parser must handle this delimiter.
For pharma, use DataMatrix with GTIN + serial + batch + expiry (the DSCSA/FMD 'four elements'). For consumer engagement, use QR (or a Digital Link QR).

flashcards.front: How does GS1 DataMatrix signal AI data?
flashcards.back: With FNC1 (0x1D) at start-of-message and between variable-length AIs.
Pharma (DSCSA/FMD), medical devices (UDI), industrial components — small labels + serialization.
GTIN, serial number, batch/lot, expiry date.

quiz.q: GS1 DataMatrix indicates its payload with…

challenges.text: Parse a GS1 DataMatrix string with GTIN + batch + expiry into fields.
Build a Dart parser handling fixed- and variable-length AIs + FNC1.
Generate a printable GS1 DataMatrix label with the 'four elements'.
Implement DSCSA-style verification: scan → parse → check GTIN/serial via API.

interviewQuestions: What is GS1 DataMatrix and how does it differ from a plain DataMatrix?
What is FNC1 and why is it required?
DataMatrix vs QR — when use each?
